body_txt: A variation of Wardrobe Malfunction , often used as a Comedy trope. A character bends down, causing the seat of their pants to loudly rip open and expose their bottom. This could be due to the character's weight, their clothes being too tight, or just being plain unlucky. The character often suffers Comedic Underwear Exposure as a result, which is even worse if they happen to be wearing Goofy Print Underwear or Uncool Undies . And if they're really unlucky , this may even happen to their underwear, or they may not be wearing underwear at all . This trope is the opposite of Magic Pants . Compare Popping Buttons , a similar wardrobe malfunction where buttons fail instead of seams, and Open-Fly Gag , which deals with a different embarrassing predicament involving one's pants. When the pants get ripped because they were caught on something, that's Stripping Snag .
